headline: Robinhood’s Agentic AI And Trump Accounts Shift Growth And Risk Profile
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) has rolled out agentic AI trading tools and AI-powered credit card features for retail customers. The new products allow users to delegate portfolio management and day to day spending decisions to AI agents with embedded safety controls. Robinhood has also partnered with the U.S. Treasury to launch federally seeded Trump Accounts, giving millions of children starter investment accounts. Robinhood built its business by giving retail investors low cost, app...

headline: Kalshi Joins CFTS In Suing Minnesota Over Prediction Markets Criminalization
summary: Kalshi sued Minnesota in federal court this week, joining Donald Trump‘s Commodity Futures Trading Commission in challenging a law signed by Tim Walz that would make the state the first to criminalize prediction markets starting Aug. 1. Walz signed the bill May 18, and the CFTC filed its challenge the following day. Kalshi joined this week with its own complaint targeting state Attorney General Keith Ellison, Walz and gambling enforcement chief John Anglin. State lawmakers framed the measure as

headline: Week’s Best:  Super Bowl Party May Cost J.P. Morgan Millions
summary: JPMorgan Chase’s  J.P. Morgan Securities has been ordered to pay $4.25 million to a broker who claimed he was wrongfully terminated and defamed by the firm, which he accused of then poaching his clients.  Brent Bodner, now with Wells Fargo, said he hosted a party for clients and prospects, but J.P. Morgan argued that the get-together violated its policy regarding business-hospitality expenses.  J.P. Morgan says it will challenge the award.

content.title: Week’s Best:  Super Bowl Party May Cost J.P. Morgan Millions
content.summary: JPMorgan Chase’s  J.P. Morgan Securities has been ordered to pay $4.25 million to a broker who claimed he was wrongfully terminated and defamed by the firm, which he accused of then poaching his clients.  Brent Bodner, now with Wells Fargo, said he hosted a party for clients and prospects, but J.P. Morgan argued that the get-together violated its policy regarding business-hospitality expenses.  J.P. Morgan says it will challenge the award.

headline: Robinhood CFO Shiv Verma on Q1 earnings, prediction markets and growth
summary: Robinhood CFO Shiv Verma provides insights into the company's first-quarter earnings, emphasizing the health and engagement of retail investors. He details the performance of new offerings such as prediction markets and the Gold credit card, and outlines Robinhood's long-term strategy to become a global financial ecosystem, focusing on active traders and wallet share.
